description: 2-layer PCB fabricated from production/gerbers.zip for the 3-key macropad.
note: Estimated small-batch per-board cost; shipping and taxes can change.

description: CircuitPython-compatible microcontroller used as the keyboard controller.
note: Solder to the PCB using the 2.54 mm headers or castellated pads.

description: Headers for mounting the XIAO RP2040 to the custom PCB.
note: Often included with the XIAO; keep this line for funding if headers are not included.

description: Three PCB-mount MX-style switches for previous, next, and play/pause keys.
note: Any compatible linear/tactile/clicky MX footprint switch should work.

description: Three 1u keycaps compatible with MX-style switches.
note: Can be purchased as loose keycaps or from a spare set.

description: Reverse-mount addressable RGB LEDs connected to D3.
note: Buy one small pack; only 3 LEDs are installed.

part: M3 x 5 x 4 mm brass heat-set inserts
description: Brass threaded inserts for the four internal mounting columns.
note: Install into the 4.7 mm blind holes in the bottom case.

description: Screws used with the heat-set inserts to fasten the case/plate assembly.
note: Use pan-head or socket-head screws that fit the printed geometry.
Print in PLA/PETG or another rigid material.

description: 3D-printed top switch plate produced from production/Top.step.
note: STEP format should be used for production export.

description: Cable for connecting the XIAO RP2040 macropad to a computer.
note: Use a data-capable USB-C cable, not charge-only.

description: Small amount of solder for assembling the XIAO, switches, and LEDs.
note: Consumable estimate; omit if you already have solder.
